languages.text: "Меров — мир, в котором есть только металл и много людей. Всякий человек там живет, служит и умирает во славу Бога-Императора. Наши истории говорят, что братья-генералы отвернулись от света Его и делают с такими полками как наш что хотят. Я думаю, истории преувеличены, чтобы пугать рекрутов. Если мы можем служить Богу-Императору среди звезд, то что нам какие-то братья-генералы?"

"Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"
languages.original_text: "Меров — мир, в котором есть только металл и много людей. Всякий человек там живет, служит и умирает во славу Бога-Императора. Наши истории говорят, что братья-генералы отвернулись от света Его и делают с такими полками как наш что хотят. Я думаю, истории преувеличены, чтобы пугать рекрутов. Если мы можем служить Богу-Императору среди звезд, то что нам какие-то братья-генералы?"

traits.locale_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

"Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

"Very little. Merov is a hive world in the Calixis Sector, where every person has their place and serves for the glory of the God-Emperor. Those who break the law are mercifully allowed to atone for their transgressions by serving in the penal legions. And, of course, I know about the brother-generals — they are said to have turned their backs on His light and used regiments like ours in bloodsports and endless bouts of one-upmanship."

Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

languages.text: 「多くはありません。メロヴはカリクシス宙域のハイヴ・ワールドで、そこでは誰もが自らの持ち場を与えられ、神皇帝の栄光のために奉仕しています。法を破った者には、慈悲として懲罰軍団に服して罪を贖う機会が与えられます。そしてもちろん、兄弟将軍たちのことも知っています――彼らは神皇帝の御光に背を向け、我々のような連隊を血の見世物や終わりなき功名争いに使い捨てたといわれています」
languages.original_text: "Very little. Merov is a hive world in the Calixis Sector, where every person has their place and serves for the glory of the God-Emperor. Those who break the law are mercifully allowed to atone for their transgressions by serving in the penal legions. And, of course, I know about the brother-generals — they are said to have turned their backs on His light and used regiments like ours in bloodsports and endless bouts of one-upmanship."

traits.locale_text: 「多くはありません。メロヴはカリクシス宙域のハイヴ・ワールドで、そこでは誰もが自らの持ち場を与えられ、神皇帝の栄光のために奉仕しています。法を破った者には、慈悲として懲罰軍団に服して罪を贖う機会が与えられます。そしてもちろん、兄弟将軍たちのことも知っています――彼らは神皇帝の御光に背を向け、我々のような連隊を血の見世物や終わりなき功名争いに使い捨てたといわれています。」

languages.text: « Le monde de Merov n'est caractérisé que par deux choses : le métal et la surpopulation. Ses habitants vivent, travaillent et meurent au nom de l'Empereur-Dieu. À en croire nos légendes, les frères-généraux ont tourné le dos à Sa lumière, et aujourd'hui, ils font ce que bon leur semble aux régiments comme les nôtres. J'ai tendance à croire que certaines de ces histoires sont exagérées dans le but de faire peur aux recrues. Si nous pouvons servir l'Empereur-Dieu au beau milieu des étoiles, pourquoi nous inquiéter à propos des frères-généraux ? »
languages.original_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

J'ai tendance à croire que certaines de ces histoires sont exagérées dans le but de faire peur aux recrues. Si nous pouvons servir l'Empereur-Dieu au beau milieu des étoiles, pourquoi nous inquiéter à propos des frères-généraux ? »

languages.text: "Merov, sadece metalin ve insan kalabalıklarının olduğu bir dünya. Buradaki herkes Tanrı İmparator adına yaşar, hizmet eder ve ölür. Hikâyelerimizde Rahip Generallerin O'nun ışığına sırtlarını döndüklerini ve artık bizimki gibi alaylara canlarının istediğini yaptıkları söyleniyor. Bence bu hikâyelerin bazıları acemilere korku salmak için abartılıyor. Eğer Tanrı İmparator'a yıldızlar arasında hizmet edebiliyorsak neden Rahip Generalleri umursayalım ki?"
languages.original_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

traits.locale_text: "Merov, sadece metalin ve insan kalabalıklarının olduğu bir dünya. Buradaki herkes Tanrı İmparator adına yaşar, hizmet eder ve ölür. Hikâyelerimizde Rahip Generallerin O'nun ışığına sırtlarını döndüklerini ve artık bizimki gibi alaylara canlarının istediğini yaptıkları söyleniyor. Bence bu hikâyelerin bazıları acemilere korku salmak için abartılıyor. Eğer Tanrı İmparator'a yıldızlar arasında hizmet edebiliyorsak neden Rahip Generalleri umursayalım ki?"

languages.text: "Merov ist eine Welt, auf der es nur Metall und massenhaft Menschen gibt. Sie alle leben, dienen und sterben im Namen des Gottimperators. Unsere Geschichten besagen, dass die Bruder-Generäle Seinem Licht den Rücken zuwandten und mit Regimentern wie dem unseren seitdem machen, was sie wollen. Ich denke, einige dieser Geschichten sind übertrieben, um Rekruten Angst zu machen. Wenn wir dem Gottimperator zwischen den Sternen dienen können, warum zerbrechen wir uns dann den Kopf über irgendwelche Bruder-Generäle?"
languages.original_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

Unsere Geschichten besagen, dass die Bruder-Generäle Seinem Licht den Rücken zuwandten und mit Regimentern wie dem unseren seitdem machen, was sie wollen. Ich denke, einige dieser Geschichten sind übertrieben, um Rekruten Angst zu machen. Wenn wir dem Gottimperator zwischen den Sternen dienen können, warum zerbrechen wir uns dann den Kopf über irgendwelche Bruder-Generäle?"

languages.text: «Merov es un mundo que solo ofrece metal y gente. Todos sus habitantes, viven, sirven y mueren en nombre del Dios Emperador. Nuestras historias dicen que los hermanos generales han dado la espalda a Su luz, y que hacen lo que les place con regimientos como el nuestro. Yo opino que algunas de esas historias están exageradas para intimidar a los reclutas. Si podemos servir al Dios Emperador entre las estrellas, ¿qué importancia tienen esos hermanos generales?».
languages.original_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"

traits.locale_text: «Merov es un mundo que solo ofrece metal y gente. Todos sus habitantes, viven, sirven y mueren en nombre del Dios Emperador. Nuestras historias dicen que los hermanos generales han dado la espalda a Su luz, y que hacen lo que les place con regimientos como el nuestro. Yo opino que algunas de esas historias están exageradas para intimidar a los reclutas. Si podemos servir al Dios Emperador entre las estrellas, ¿qué importancia tienen esos hermanos generales?».

languages.text: “梅罗夫这个世界，除了金属和成堆的人，别的什么也没有。那里的人，从生到死，都在为神皇效命。根据我们流传的传说，那些将军兄弟早已背弃了祂的光辉，现如今会对我们这样的军团为所欲为。不过我觉得有些故事是在添油加醋，就为了吓唬新兵。既然我们能在群星之间侍奉神皇，又何必在意什么将军兄弟？”
languages.original_text: "Merov is a world that has nothing but metal and throngs of people. Every one of them lives, serves, and dies in the name of the God-Emperor. Our stories say the Brother-Generals have turned their backs on His light, and now they do whatever they please to regiments like ours. I think some of those stories are exaggerated to strike fear into recruits. If we can serve the God-Emperor among the stars, why concern ourselves with some Brother-Generals?"
